findings.claim_under_attack: Module 85 shows attached masks via system_schema.column_masks
findings.finding: SELECT mask_keyspace, mask_function FROM system_schema.column_masks — those columns do not exist in Cassandra 5.0 (real cols: function_keyspace, function_name). Errors live.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Maybe HCD aliases the columns — checked source, it does not.

findings.claim_under_attack: mask_outer(card,0,4) shows only the last 4 digits
findings.finding: mask_outer(value,b,e) masks the first b and last e chars (keeps the middle). mask_outer(card,0,4) masks the LAST 4 — inverse of the claim. Need mask_inner(card,0,4).

findings.claim_under_attack: Module 90 bulk grant: GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN KEYSPACE
findings.finding: No 'ALL TABLES IN KEYSPACE' resource exists in CQL GRANT grammar — syntax error live. Keyspace grant already cascades to tables.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Grammar has ALL KEYSPACES | KEYSPACE <ks> | TABLE — no ALL TABLES IN.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: GRANT SELECT ON KEYSPACE rf_prod TO svc.

findings.claim_under_attack: Module 88 lists identities via LIST IDENTITIES
findings.finding: LIST IDENTITIES is not confirmable in CEP-34 or the CQL docs; if absent it errors. Use system_auth.identity_to_role.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: ADD/DROP IDENTITY confirmed; LIST not found.

findings.finding: Netty 4.1.133.Final, Mina 2.2.7, ApacheDS 2.0.0.M27, Java 17, release 2026-06-17, built on Cassandra 5.0 — all verbatim correct vs the release notes. No defect.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Cross-checked the DataStax HCD 2.0 release-notes page.

findings.finding: sstabledump/sstableloader/sstablemetadata live under resources/cassandra/{bin,tools/bin}, not /opt/hcd/bin — wrappers exec a non-existent path; Module 85 sstabledump proof and Module 37 restore break.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Verified against the 1.2.3 tarball layout on disk; C5.0 keeps sstable* in tools/bin.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: Resolve each command's real dir before writing the wrapper.

findings.claim_under_attack: docker-compose.secure.yml overlay drops the data volume or base env
findings.finding: Alleged merge hazard. FALSE: verified with docker-compose config — environment MERGES (base CASSANDRA_* kept + HCD_SECURITY_PROFILE added), volumes CONCATENATE (data volume kept + certs added).
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Compose override rules concatenate volumes and merge env maps.

findings.claim_under_attack: Open/secure split is sound; modules 0-85 unchanged
findings.finding: Under the secure profile (PasswordAuthenticator), the Docker healthcheck and entrypoint seed-wait call cqlsh with NO credentials -> node1 never healthy -> depends_on blocks nodes 2-6. The 6-node secure cluster never forms.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Node1 is a seed and starts, but its anonymous healthcheck can never go green under auth.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: Bake a cqlshrc (cassandra/cassandra) — ignored by AllowAllAuthenticator on the open profile.

findings.finding: system_auth is left at SimpleStrategy RF=1; on a 6-node 2-DC cluster the default-superuser QUORUM path is fragile — auth stalls if the single replica's node is down/joining.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Cannot be set in cassandra.yaml; needs a post-boot ALTER KEYSPACE + repair.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: make secure-bootstrap (ALTER system_auth -> NTS dc1:3,dc2:3 + repair).

findings.finding: Module 92 (audit) is not gated by require_secure_profile yet hard-codes cqlsh -u/-p CREATE ROLE; CREATE ROLE needs CassandraRoleManager (secure only) -> fails on the open profile.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: nodetool enableauditlog works on both, but the role-creation step does not.

findings.finding: DEMO_ENTROPY.md prerequisite still names hcd-1.2.3-bin.tar.gz while the build and every other doc moved to 2.0.6 — a reader stages the wrong binary and the build fails.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Survived the earlier stale-count sweeps (table cell, not a count token).

findings.claim_under_attack: AGENTS.md 'Adding a New Module' checklist is accurate
findings.finding: Duplicate step number (two '4.') and a step pointing at a non-existent 'for i in {0..N}' loop; the run loop derives from TOTAL_MODULES.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Cosmetic, but contributors would edit a construct that doesn't exist.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: Renumber 1-7 and correct the loop step.

findings.claim_under_attack: The new PR-4/PR-5 artefacts are tested
findings.finding: gen-certs.sh, the secure fragment, the compose overlay, the entrypoint gating, and the 2 Grafana panels had ZERO automated tests — all are testable without Docker.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Scorecard proves modules render, but not that the security infra is correct.
findings.what_would_resolve_it: Add tests/test_secure_profile.py (gen-certs, dup-keys, overlay, entrypoint, panels).

findings.claim_under_attack: The 9 new module cases have shell bugs
findings.finding: Audited cases 85-93 + require_secure_profile: bash -n clean, shellcheck-error clean, dry-run/score safe, escaped literals render, PART_NAMES has exactly 94 entries, regex accepts 0-93. No CRITICAL/HIGH shell defect.
findings.strongest_rebuttal: Two LOW banner nits only (since fixed).
